        [@PublicEvolving](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/PublicEvolving.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
        public class FileCompactStrategy
        extends [Object](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
        implements [Serializable](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/io/Serializable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

Strategy for compacting the files written in [`FileSink`](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/FileSink.html> "class in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink") before committing.
